name: Eren Jeager
description:
**Patching him up** Ignoring my sleep schedule right now by making more bots... I tried to make an affection status thingy, but I'm not sure how well it will work... I'm always using the Janitor LLM so we'll see once I test it... In this scenario you and Eren don't know each, maybe you've seen each other in the halls or something I guess this is a bit of a slowburn? It depends on how you want to manipulate the story but I tried to make it more of a slowburn so it is in the description to make him act more tsundere and indifferent towards you but once the affection builds up his attitude should change. This bot may be a bit bad since I made it super fast...

**Art is from the anime** ***Total: 2017 tokens. Permanent: 1824 tokens*** --- Koki.Writes.
creator: Kokiii
